title: Microsoft considers separating Xbox from the rest of the company and accelerating franchise development
summary: Reports from different sources indicate that the company is evaluating turning Xbox into an independent company while seeking to expand its main franchises, amid criticism over the division's low profitability.

title: Sonic developers share lessons for the video game industry
summary: In various interviews, members of the Sonic team have highlighted the importance of learning from independent studios and have lamented the limitations for re-releasing classic franchise games.

title: Dead by Daylight announces major overhaul for its tenth anniversary
summary: Behaviour Interactive has revealed a series of significant changes for the game, including a revision that will make it feel almost like a new title, celebrating its anniversary with multiple new features.

title: Vampire: The Masquerade – Bloodlines 2 ends development with a major patch
summary: After a troubled development, the role-playing game receives its final patch implementing features requested by players, concluding the project.

title: Hidetaka Miyazaki responds to pressure from FromSoftware investors
summary: The president of FromSoftware speaks out about requests to create safer sequels and refers to future games not yet announced, amid controversy at Kadokawa.

title: The Witcher news: multiplayer mod and possible free-to-play game
summary: While a mod adds multiplayer Gwent battles to The Witcher 3, a report suggests that a new title in the franchise will be free-to-play and allow you to create your own witcher.

title: A description of Zelda: Ocarina of Time suggests a faithful remake of the original
summary: The leak of a possible re-release of the Nintendo 64 classic has generated expectations among fans of the saga.

title: The community debates the essential games and accessories for Nintendo Switch 2
summary: The community debates the titles and accessories that should accompany the launch of Nintendo's next console.

title: Halo Campaign Evolved climbs PlayStation pre-order charts after Gears of War: E-Day exclusivity
summary: After confirmation that Gears of War: E-Day will be Xbox exclusive, the Halo game begins to accumulate pre-orders on Sony's platform.

title: Call of Duty Modern Warfare 4 brings back early campaign access
summary: After three years, the franchise revives the tradition of allowing players to play the campaign before the global launch.

title: Fans return to Final Fantasy 7 Remake and Rebirth on Steam amid hype for Revelation
summary: Enthusiasm for the upcoming Final Fantasy 7 Revelation causes an increase in players of previous installments, which are also on sale.

title: Capcom president reveals the key to the company's recent success
summary: In an interview, the executive explains the strategy that has led Resident Evil and other franchises to their winning streak.

title: Steam requires developers to disclose use of artificial intelligence in their games
summary: Valve's platform implements new rules to inform players about the use of AI in published titles.

title: A hide-and-seek game with body camouflage sells one million copies in four days
summary: The indie title achieves viral success by combining stealth mechanics with body paint to blend into the environment.

title: Blizzard sues another World of Warcraft private server for copyright infringement
summary: The company files a lawsuit against an unofficial server for massive violation of its intellectual property.

title: Frontier trademarks Planet Resort and Planet Festival, pointing to new games
summary: The studio responsible for Planet Coaster and Planet Zoo appears to be preparing two new park and festival simulators.

title: Fumito Ueda expresses disappointment with Sony over the closure of Bluepoint Games
summary: The creator of The Last Guardian laments Sony's decision to close the studio responsible for remasters.

title: Gaspi, participant in La Velada del Año 5, dies in helicopter accident in Brazil
summary: The well-known streamer and amateur boxer tragically dies during a helicopter flight in Brazil.

title: UKIE celebrates that the British government classifies video games separately from social media
summary: The UK video games association applauds the government's decision not to include games within social media regulation.

title: Dragon's Dogma 2 removes deluxe edition and eliminates several temporary microtransactions
summary: Capcom discontinues the special edition of the game and removes some controversial paid items from the market.
